error_signature: sending the same quote every day
title: Workflow sends the same quote daily
symptom: The workflow runs successfully but sends the same quote every day instead of iterating through a list.
applies_when: Using Google Sheets to store quotes
not_this_if: Quotes are being fetched from a different source
Workflow is not set to run daily
root_cause: The workflow does not track which quote has been sent previously, leading to the same quote being selected each time it runs. Without a mechanism to update the status of sent quotes, the workflow cannot differentiate between them.
fix_steps: Add a column named 'Status' in your Google Sheets to track sent quotes.
Configure the Google Sheets node to only retrieve rows where Status is not 'sent'.
After sending the email, add an Update Row node to mark the quote as 'sent' using the Row ID.
agent_instruction: Implement a status tracking system in your Google Sheets to manage sent quotes.
